title: Dow Plummets Amid Oil Price Surge Due to U.S.-Iran War
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average tumbled over 700 points as oil prices soared due to investor concerns about the ongoing U.S.-Iran war.
charlotte_impact: Escalating conflict drives market instability, impacting investments and economic outlook.

title: UMass Stuns Miami (Ohio) in MAC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: UMass delivered a stunning upset to No. 20 Miami (Ohio) in the MAC tournament quarterfinals, fueled by second-chance points.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the unpredictability and excitement of college basketball tournaments.

title: Synagogue Attacker Killed by Security in Detroit Area
summary: A suspect who rammed a vehicle into a Detroit-area synagogue was killed by security after the attack, according to the Oakland County Sheriff.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about security at religious institutions and potential hate crimes.

title: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei Joins X
summary: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has created a verified account on Elon Musk's X platform and has begun posting.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the use of social media by global leaders, even those with strained relations with the West.

title: Ray J Accuses Kardashians of Perjury in Sex Tape Case
summary: Ray J alleges that Kim Kardashian and Kris Jenner lied under oath regarding their involvement in the release of their sex tape.

title: Americans Forgo Basic Needs to Afford Healthcare
summary: A significant portion of Americans are skipping meals and other necessities to afford healthcare, highlighting the affordability crisis.

title: Strait of Hormuz Closure Could Trigger Stagflation
summary: Prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to military conflict could lead to stagflation in the U.S. economy.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a critical vulnerability in global oil supply and its potential economic consequences.

title: Senate Passes Housing Bill Targeting Large Investors
summary: The Senate passed a bipartisan housing bill aimed at curbing large investor purchases of single-family homes and easing regulations.

title: Atlassian Prioritizes Graduates in Layoff Strategy
summary: Atlassian CEO outlines that graduates, high performers, and employees with transferable skills are spared in recent layoffs.

title: 2026 NCAA Men's Basketball Conference Tournaments Tracker

title: Raiders Refuse to Trade Maxx Crosby
